description.ko: 기하학적 구조가 디지털 파편으로 분해되는 모습을 날카롭고 대비가 강하게 시각화하여, 질서와 혼돈의 경계를 탐구합니다.
description.en: A sharp, high-contrast visualization of geometric structures breaking down into digital fragments, exploring the boundary between order and chaos.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith by KURO-X, titled 'Vectorized Entropy.' The structure is in a state of violent mathematical deconstruction, exploding into a calculated vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. Set against a clinical #FFFFFF digital void, the composition is riddled with intentional pixel-sorting artifacts, heavy digital glitch scanlines, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast cinematic lighting with ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the precise moment where perfect order shatters into digital chaos.
